ghInfo.author: pemikalsen-sudo
ghInfo.bodyExcerpt:
pemikalsen-sudo created an issue (dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee#302)

### What Feature / Enhancement?

Universal Tuya App 7.4.11 crashes during startup.
App installs OK.
When trying to add new device "Universal Tuya" does not show up in the add new device dialog.
Immidiately after restarting the App th error message "Chrashed during loading" shows up in the add new device dialog and all devices from the app disappears. After about 1 minute the app disappears from the ad new device dialogue.
I
